# Merag Nokhiz — Cloud & On-Prem Systems Architect & Engineer

> Senior Cloud & On-Prem Systems Architect and Engineer with 10+ years of experience designing and building scalable, resilient infrastructure across AWS, Azure, GCP, and on-premise environments. Focus areas: Landing Zone, Data Mesh, Internal Developer Platform (IDP), GenAI/LLMOps, MLOps, FinOps, SRE, and Zero-Trust Security.

## Site

- [Homepage](https://nokhiz.github.io/)

- [Contact](https://nokhiz.github.io/contact)

## About Merag Nokhiz

Merag Nokhiz is a Cloud & On-Prem Systems Architect and Engineer based in Germany. He designs developer-centric platforms that reduce operational friction while enforcing security and compliance requirements. His work spans full cloud migrations (Lift & Shift, Re-platform, Re-architect), internal developer platforms, ML infrastructure, and enterprise-scale cost optimization.

**Key expertise:**
- Cloud Architecture: AWS, Azure, GCP, hybrid and on-premise
- Landing Zones and multi-account governance
- Platform Engineering: Internal Developer Platforms with Backstage, golden paths, self-service infrastructure
- MLOps & LLMOps: end-to-end ML lifecycle, feature stores, model serving, scalable inference
- GenAI Infrastructure: agentic systems, RAG pipelines, LLM deployment
- FinOps: 20–50% cloud cost reduction via Reserved Instances, Spot strategies, governance frameworks
- SRE: SLOs, error budgets, GitOps-driven automation
- Security & Compliance: Zero-Trust, IAM hardening, GDPR, SOC 2, ISO 27001
- Infrastructure as Code: Terraform, Pulumi, Ansible
- Containers & Orchestration: Kubernetes, Helm, ArgoCD

**Contact:**
- Email: hello@meragnokhiz.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/meragnokhiz
- GitHub: https://github.com/nokhiz
- Calendar: https://cal.com/nokhiz/meeting

Technical writing on cloud infrastructure, platform engineering, AI systems, and industry observations.

## Selected Projects

Enterprise infrastructure and platform engineering projects across automotive, medtech, and optics industries.

- BMW eSign — Digital signing platform on Azure
- BMW Delivery & EVE — Cloud-native delivery and EV ecosystem infrastructure
- B. Braun IDP — Internal Developer Platform for global medtech company
- B. Braun IoT MedTech — IoT infrastructure for connected medical devices
- B. Braun Landing Zone — AWS Landing Zone for regulated healthcare environment
- ZEISS MLOps Infrastructure Platform — End-to-end ML platform for precision optics
- ZEISS On-Premise HPC Cluster — High-performance computing cluster for scientific workloads
